mapper.select: SELECT id, name, created_at FROM tags ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT id, name, created_at FROM tags WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, name, created_at FROM tags WHERE name = #{name} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tags(name, created_at) VALUES (#{name}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE tags SET name = #{name} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT t.id, t.name FROM resource_tags rt INNER JOIN tags t ON t.id = rt.tag_id WHERE rt.resource_id = #{resourceId} ORDER BY t.id
